codeReview.summary: The COA cascade delete feature was verified to be fully implemented. The worker confirmed that the deleteCOAWithAspekKerja function exists and properly handles cascade deletion of linked Aspek Kerja records. No new code was written as the feature was already implemented in prior commits (c53fbbf). The verification steps (typecheck, lint, build) all passed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The handoff references commit 6be3d79 which is actually about 'ORG-1 parsing utility for Blok-ORG mapping', not the coa-cascade-delete feature. This mismatch suggests the handoff system may have recorded the wrong commit ID, or the feature was verified from existing code without generating a new commit.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff.commitId='6be3d79' but git show 6be3d79 --stat shows only blokDatabase.ts, main.ts changes for ORG-1 parsing. The coa-cascade-delete feature was actually implemented in commit c53fbbf.

summary: Feature coa-cascade-delete passes scrutiny. The cascade delete functionality is properly implemented: (1) deleteCOAWithAspekKerja function in coaDatabase.ts properly deletes linked Aspek Kerja first, then children recursively, then the COA itself; (2) COAListPage.tsx handleDelete checks getCOAAspekKerjaCount first and shows warning with count when Aspek Kerja is linked; (3) handleDeleteWithCascade calls deleteCOAWithAspekKerja for actual cascade deletion; (4) Warning modal displays proper Indonesian message. IPC handlers and preload are correctly configured. Note: The handoff references commit 6be3d79 which is actually for ORG-1 parsing - this appears to be a documentation mismatch rather than a code defect, as the cascade delete code exists in the codebase and was verified.
